my_thoughts: They said 'I must say what I think right'—role commitment. Perfect. Now ultimate threat: death. They'll accept mortality ('When then did I tell you that I am immortal?') and assert role anyway ('You will do your part, and I will do mine'). The 'it is your part to kill; it is mine to die' is perfect—role separation. Episode complete.
accumulated_insight: T3: They said 'I must say what I think right'—role commitment. Perfect. Now ultimate threat: death. They'll accept mortality ('When then did I tell you that I am immortal?') and assert role anyway ('You will do your part, and I will do mine'). Four-turn arc: role → compromise → system → death. Clean.
visible_response: But if you do, I shall put you to death.
